welcome.main: Explore our experimental AI-powered municipal services
welcome.subtitle: Choose a concept to get started

concept1.title: Concept 1: Intent Analysis
concept1.description: AI-powered intent recognition and form construction for municipal services. Record your voice and let our AI understand what you need.

concept2.title: Concept 2: Voice Recording
concept2.description: Voice-to-text transcription and AI assistance for municipal requests. Perfect for accessibility and hands-free interaction.

footer.disclaimer: This is a prototype for experimental AI municipal services. For testing purposes only.

messages.aiMessage: Incoming message from your personal AI agent:
messages.subsidyQuestion: Maybe you are eligible for a subsidy for the neighborhood party, shall I try to apply for this?
messages.ideas: What ideas do you already have for the neighborhood party? Then we'll take those into account.
messages.callout: For now our prototype can only help you with a few scenarios: parking tickets, relocations, and X, Y and Z. Try it out already!

recording.addRecording: Add a recording or continue with request

errors.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. Please try recording again.
errors.testError: This is a test error message
errors.testWarning: This is a test warning message
errors.testInfo: This is a test info message

choose.title: We're not sure what you meant
